*-------.   Visit each of the following Wikipedia pages and answer the question for each topic. Return all six answers with the citation URL for each.

1. Axolotl neoteny: https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Axolotl — What is the scientific name of the axolotl?
2. Voynich manuscript: https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Voynich_manuscript — In which library is the Voynich manuscript currently held?
3. Pando clonal colony: https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Pando_(tree) — In which US state is the Pando clonal colony located?
4. Antikythera mechanism: https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Antikythera_mechanism — Approximately what century BCE was the Antikythera mechanism built?
5. Mantis shrimp vision: https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Mantis_shrimp — How many types of photoreceptor cells do mantis shrimp have (approximate)?
6. Svalbard Global Seed Vault: https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Svalbard_Global_Seed_Vault — In which country is the Svalbard Global Seed Vault located?
